title: Aluminium Biryani Pan Wok with Wooden Handle Deep Wok Aluminium Pan Indian Chinese Cooking Large Stir Fry Pan Flat Bottom Base Kitchen Restaurant Catering Home (26cm)
features: Enhance your cooking and dining experience with this wok style biryani pan. A heavy-duty deep wok pan crafted from high-quality aluminium with durable riveted wooden handle and flat base for you to cook, sauté, deep fry or pre-heat tasty authentic dishes from many cuisines such as a Chinese Stir Fry, Fried Rice, Indian Biryani or even Indo-Chinese Chilli Paneer!
This Aluminium Wok Style Biryani Pan With Wooden Handle is available in 2 DIFFERENT SIZES – 24cm and 26.5cm. NOTE – ONLY ONE IN YOUR CHOSE SIZE SHALL BE SENT OUT.

WOK STYLE BIRYANI PAN – A deep cooking pan specially built for you to cook various rice based dishes from cuisines around the world such as biryani, vegetable pulao, fried rice & more. But due flat base and deep rounded walls, you can also use this pan as wok to cook large portions of well-seasoned food.

ROUNDED FLAT BOTTOM PAN – To evenly cook food with balance, this biryani pan is built with a flat base and curved up walls. Flat base will keep the pan on the hob with stability, while the curved walls will rise heat up and circulate for best cooking results all the way round. Curved walls give the pan a deep structure to let you toss food to ensure all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.

ALUMINIUM STRUCTURE & WOODEN HANDLE – This pan is crafted from heavy-gauge aluminium due to its excellent heat conductive properties, hence swiftly cooked food. For safety this deep wok pan is securely attached with a long riveted wooden handle, so you can safely cook, carry or manoeuvre without feeling any heat and comfortable grip.
